overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a beige jacket walking along an urban waterfront promenade in late afternoon sunlight. The character traverses stone docks, ascends stairs to a tree-lined brick walkway, and continues along concrete embankments beside a river with highway bridges and city buildings in the background.

events.description: character begins ascending stone stairs from lower dock to upper level
transitioning from stone dock to red brick promenade

agents.ego_description: walking along stone pier with rusted railings, then ascending stairs to upper promenade while holding a firearm

entered.detail: weathered stone dock surface with metal railings along the water edge
brown metal safety railing along the pier edge
large concrete overpass bridge spanning the canal
industrial barge with crane arm on the water

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a stone pier beneath a concrete highway bridge. The character walks along the dock past a rusted metal railing, with a work barge visible on the water. Around 8 seconds, the character ascends stone stairs to reach an upper promenade level, transitioning from the enclosed dock area to an open walkway.

events.description: entering tree-lined upper promenade with red brick pavement

agents.ego_description: walking along curved red brick promenade passing concrete planters and young trees

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking along the promenade in the same direction

entered.detail: curved walkway with red brick pavement pattern
rectangular concrete planters with green shrubs
young deciduous trees lining the promenade edge
multi-story residential buildings with varied architecture

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated red brick promenade lined with concrete planters and young trees. Urban apartment buildings rise in the background to the left. The path curves gently along the waterfront, with the water visible to the right. A distant pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower waterfront walkway with retaining walls

events.description: descending to lower stone walkway adjacent to water

agents.ego_description: walking along lower stone walkway next to textured concrete retaining wall, passing under power lines

entered.detail: lower walkway with irregular stone paving stones
rough-finished concrete retaining wall with vertical seams
tall metal power line towers with multiple cables
metal framework railway bridge visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character descends to a lower waterfront walkway paved with cobblestones. A tall textured concrete retaining wall runs along the left side, while the canal water is immediately adjacent on the right. Electrical transmission towers and a distant truss bridge are visible ahead. The lighting becomes slightly diffused as the character walks in the shadow of the wall.

events.description: character stops at water's edge to observe the canal and distant bridge
entering brighter, slightly hazy area near the highway bridge

agents.ego_description: pausing to look out over the water toward the truss bridge, then continuing along the curved embankment

entered.detail: light-colored concrete embankment wall on the opposite shore
low industrial building with flat roof near the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the water's edge to observe the canal and distant truss bridge. The scene opens up to a wide waterfront view with the concrete highway bridge now closer overhead. The lighting becomes brighter and slightly hazy as the character continues walking along the curved stone embankment, approaching the bridge structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an enclosed industrial pier up to an elevated urban promenade before descending back toward a wide, hazy waterfront. It begins on a stone dock beneath a concrete highway bridge, moving past a rusted railing and a work barge before the character ascends stone stairs to an upper level. As the environment opens up, the camera follows the character along a red brick walkway lined with young trees and apartment buildings, curving gently beside the water. The scene then shifts as the character descends to a lower cobblestone path, where the lighting becomes diffused in the shadow of a tall concrete retaining wall. Finally, the view expands toward a distant truss bridge and electrical towers, with the light brightening and becoming hazy as the character walks along the curved embankment back toward the overhead bridge structure.
